login.title: Sign in
login.failed: Login failed — check the demo credentials and that the Auth service is running.
login.googleNote: Google sign-in is limited to users registered as testers in this app's Google Cloud project (its OAuth consent screen is in testing mode) — everyone else, use the demo login above.
login.demoNote: Demo account: demo / demo. Pick ROLE_ADMIN to exercise admin-gated actions.
audit.filtersBlurb: Narrow the activity log by feature, action, detail text, or time window — the matching count, trends, and log below all follow the same filter.
audit.summaryBlurb: Headline activity for the last 24 hours — deliberately independent of the filters, so it always answers “what is happening on this deployment right now”. The matching count and charts below do follow the filters.
audit.trendsBlurb: Events over time for the current filter — hourly across the last 24 hours or daily across the last 7 days, aggregated in the database.
audit.logBlurb: The event-sourced audit trail: every user and agent action, published to Kafka and consumed into an immutable log. Sortable, paginated, and filtered by the controls above.
audit.loadError: Could not load audit logs — is the Audit service running and are you signed in?
audit.addDemoError: Could not add demo logs — the demo endpoint only exists in LOCAL/DEV.
audit.systemViewBlurb: This dashboard is the domain view — what users and agents did. Server metrics, logs and traces live in the system view.
refdata.title: Reference data
refdata.blurb: Security-master reference data — a batch-loaded, read-heavy dataset. Bulk-loaded on startup and extended by a small daily batch.
refdata.name: Name
refdata.loadError: Could not load reference data — is the Audit service running and are you signed in?
assistant.hint: Ask about this application — its features, how to sign in, or what the audit data shows.
assistant.screening: Messages are screened server-side; don't paste credentials or personal data.
assistant.sample1: What does the audit service do?
assistant.placeholder: Ask a question about this app…
assistant.error503: The assistant is not available right now (it may not be configured on this server).
assistant.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again.
profile.title: Your profile
profile.name: Name
